record.field: High value dollar transactions are candidates for FIU reporting

select t.name refno,t.amount,batch_code,t.currency,t.inputter,t.authorizer, t.date_created tran_date,t.tran_type,a.name account_number,a.account_name from res_customer_transaction t left join res_partner_account a on t.account_id=a.id where t.amount >= 1.8 and t.currency='USD' and a.id=#ACCOUNT_ID#
